name: Jane's Fashion Studio
author: Poki
description: Jane’s Fashion Studio is a stylish dress-up game where fashion meets storytelling! Style multiple unique characters with many outfits, hairstyles, and accessories, uncover their personal stories in Story Mode, and help them gain confidence through fashion. Take on themed styling challenges in Challenge Mode, and enjoy fun social moments as characters post updates, messages, and receive compliments in your in-game feed. Ready to create stunning looks and shape every story with style? How to play Jane's Fashion Studio? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Jane's Fashion Studio? Jane's Fashion Studio is created by Orenji Spark. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Jane's Fashion Studio for free? You can play Jane's Fashion Studio for free on Poki. Can I play Jane's Fashion Studio on mobile devices and desktop? Jane's Fashion Studio can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
